query:
SELECT pt.id, pt.portfolioId, pt.transactionType, pt.ticker, pt.shares, pt.pricePerShare, pt.currency, pt.totalAmount, pt.totalAmountCHF, pt.transactionDate, pt.notes
FROM portfolioTransactions pt
JOIN savedPortfolios sp ON pt.portfolioId = sp.id
WHERE sp.name LIKE '%Test Portfolio Marc%'
ORDER BY pt.transactionDate DESC, pt.id DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
